title: Compressed Wooden Sword(压缩木剑)
description: You can use a compressed stick to craft a compressed wooden sword!
body:
You can use nine compressed wooden sticks to create a compressed wooden stick, then use nine compressed wooden sticks to create a double compressed wooden stick, and then use nine double compressed wooden sticks to create a triple compressed wooden stick. 


Knowing that you have created two eight compressed wooden sticks, you can use the Eight-fold compressed wooden sticks to create a compressed wooden sword. 


The damage of this wooden sword is infinite.


![compressed stick1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7420ce997affdfb6f3b1cdc036de7a99a8e12c4d.png)
![Compressed Wooden Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f44f49b14840bc94f2cfb3e2201e90088b7401c9.png)
